artPrompt: A gaunt ashen-robed human cleric mid-sermon, arms flung wide in foreshortened close-up beneath a cold gold halo, preaching to empty pews in a candle-guttering revival hall. A doomsday clock tower looms through smoke behind him against a blood-dark sky, bone-white face contorted with diminishing fervor, ash drifting through hard shafts of light, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Cleric of Diminishing Returns
text:
{T}, Pay 1 life: Draw a card, then put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock.
{T}, Remove two doom counters from the Doomsday Clock: You gain 4 life. Salvation, but only in bulk.
flavorText: Sermon length is up 400%. Attendance is down 100%. The math is, as ever, divine.
